EXPLORE.AVBASE_NO_FILTER_RESULTS: No movies match the current filters

TORRENTS.FILTER_PLACEHOLDER: Instant filter by title, indexer or metadata...
TORRENTS.NO_RESULTS_DESC: Search for torrents using the search bar above, or browse from the Explore page.
TORRENTS.JAV_DEFAULT_PATH_HINT: The JAV default is prefilled; you can override it for this download
TORRENTS.FC2_DEFAULT_PATH_HINT: The FC2 default is prefilled; you can override it for this download

SETTINGS.TASK_RUN_FAILED: Could not start the task. Try again later.

sync_emby_library.NAME: Sync Emby library
sync_emby_library.DESCRIPTION: Refresh media counts, playback progress, and library indexes

clean_image_cache.NAME: Clean image cache
clean_image_cache.DESCRIPTION: Remove expired proxy images and limit local cache usage

refresh_subscriptions.NAME: Refresh subscriptions
refresh_subscriptions.DESCRIPTION: Check subscribed performers and movies for new content

sync_avbase_releases.NAME: Sync AVBase releases
sync_avbase_releases.DESCRIPTION: Fetch daily releases and update movie metadata

sync_avbase_performers.NAME: Sync AVBase performers
sync_avbase_performers.DESCRIPTION: Update newcomer and popular performer lists

sync_fc2_rankings.NAME: Sync FC2 rankings
sync_fc2_rankings.DESCRIPTION: Refresh FC2 charts, ranks, and movie summaries

refresh_performer_profiles.NAME: Refresh performer profiles
refresh_performer_profiles.DESCRIPTION: Periodically refresh saved performer photos and profiles

SETTINGS.PROWLARR_DESC: Connect Prowlarr to search downloadable movie resources from one place.
SETTINGS.DOWNLOAD_PATHS_DESC: The current movie details page determines the directory: JAV movies use the JAV directory and FC2 movies use the FC2 directory.
SETTINGS.DEFAULT_DOWNLOAD_PATH_HINT: Used when a type-specific directory is empty or the torrent type is unknown
SETTINGS.JAV_DOWNLOAD_PATH_HINT: Used by JAV movie details and automatic subscriptions; falls back to the general directory
SETTINGS.FC2_DOWNLOAD_PATH_HINT: Falls back to the general default when empty
SETTINGS.QBITTORRENT_DESC: Configure the downloader connection, credentials, and global title filters.
SETTINGS.TELEGRAM_DESC: Send subscription and download updates to a Telegram chat through your bot.
SETTINGS.EMBY_DESC: Connect an Emby server to synchronize the library and playback state.
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_RULES_DESC: Each group independently combines keywords, regex, resolution, and codec conditions. Groups are matched top to bottom; the result with the most seeders in the first matching group is selected. Separate keywords with commas, semicolons, or new lines.
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_REGEX_HINT: Optional; both keyword and regex rules must match
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_GLOBAL_EXCLUDED_HINT: Any title containing one of these is rejected, for example: advertisement, trailer
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_QUALITY_RULES_HINT: Each group is independent; add a group with every field empty last for a fallback
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_NO_QUALITY_RULES: No rule groups configured; automatic subscriptions use only the exclusions above and seeder count.
SETTINGS.SUBSCRIBE_RULES_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save subscription filter rules. Please try again.
SETTINGS.MOVIE_SUBSCRIBE_RULES_DESC: These rules apply only to the current movie. Turn off global rules to configure separate exclusions and priority matching groups.
SETTINGS.MOVIE_SUBSCRIBE_EXCLUDED_HINT: Reject matching titles only for the current movie
SETTINGS.USE_GLOBAL_SUBSCRIBE_RULES_HINT: When enabled, this movie always follows the latest global filters. Disable it to use per-movie rules.
SETTINGS.FOLLOWING_GLOBAL_RULES_HINT: Changes to the global subscription filters automatically apply to this movie.
SETTINGS.MOVIE_SUBSCRIBE_RULES_SAVED: Subscription rules for this movie were saved.
SETTINGS.MOVIE_SUBSCRIBE_RULES_SAVE_FAILED: Failed to save rules for this movie. Please try again.

DOWNLOAD_PAGE.NO_ACTIVE_DESC: Your ongoing downloads will appear here.

SUBSCRIPTION.CUSTOM_RULES_ACTIVE: This movie uses individual subscription rules

DETAILS.LIGHTBOX_HINT: Scroll to zoom · Drag to pan
